---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in Cadence
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## What happened

A clear, concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Tap on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- **Platform:** iOS / Android / Web
- **App version:** (e.g., 0.1.0)
- **Device:** (e.g., iPhone 15, Pixel 8)
- **OS version:** (e.g., iOS 18.0, Android 15)
- **Locale:** (e.g., en-US, es-MX)
- **Section size:** (e.g., solo, 3 people, 7 people)

## Screenshots / screen recording

If applicable, add screenshots or a screen recording to help explain the problem.

## Logs

If you can grab them:
- iOS: Console.app filtered by "Cadence"
- Android: `adb logcat | grep Cadence`

## Severity

- [ ] Blocker — app is unusable
- [ ] Critical — major feature broken
- [ ] Major — minor feature broken, workaround exists
- [ ] Minor — cosmetic, no functional impact

## Privacy check

- [ ] I have NOT included any personal data (Section member names, reflections, verses, email) in this report
- [ ] I have replaced personal data with `[REDACTED]` where needed
